title: Heatwave Protection (NDMA)
rights: Workers have the right to shaded resting areas and drinking water
Local governments often issue red alerts requiring specific occupational safety measures
avoid: Avoid going out in the sun, especially between 12.00 noon and 3.00 p.m.
Avoid strenuous activities when the outside temperature is high
Avoid alcohol, tea, coffee, and carbonated soft drinks, which dehydrate the body
